info.title: OAuth 2.1
info.description: Endpoints for registering applications and managing OAuth 2.1 tokens.

post.description: Register a new OAuth app. Credentials are sent by email. No authentication required.

400.description: Invalid or unparseable JSON body. Error code: `bad_request`. Message: `"Request body must be valid JSON."`

error.message: Request body must be valid JSON.

409.description: Email already registered to another app. Error code: `conflict`. Message: `"An app is already registered with this email address."`

error.message: An app is already registered with this email address.

500.description: Failed to create or persist the app. Error code: `internal_error`. Message: `"An unexpected error occurred."` Use the `request_id` to correlate with server-side logs.

post.description: Issues a new client_secret and immediately invalidates the previous one. The client_id stays the same. Active user tokens are not affected.

200.description: Credentials rotated successfully. New credentials sent by email.

400.description: Invalid or unparseable JSON body. Error code: `bad_request`. Message: `"Request body must be valid JSON."`

error.message: Request body must be valid JSON.

401.description: Email does not match the one registered with the app. Error code: `invalid_client`. Message: `"Invalid client credentials."`

404.description: App not found or revoked. Error code: `not_found`. Message: `"App not found."`

500.description: Failed to rotate or persist the credentials. Error code: `internal_error`. Message: `"An unexpected error occurred."` Use the `request_id` to correlate with server-side logs.

get.description: Redirects the user's browser to the Vendaze consent screen. **This endpoint must be opened in a browser. do not call it with fetch, axios, or any HTTP client.** The user must navigate to this URL so they can log in and approve access. Scopes are resolved from the app registration.

parameters.name: redirect_uri
parameters.description: Redirect URI registered with the application.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Random string you generate. Returned unchanged in the callback. Strongly recommended to prevent CSRF attacks.

302.description: Redirect to the Vendaze consent screen.

400.description: Invalid or missing parameter. Possible error codes: `invalid_request` (missing required parameter. message identifies which one, e.g. `"Missing required parameter: redirect_uri."`), `unsupported_response_type` (`response_type` is not `code`. message: `"response_type must be \"code\"."`), `invalid_request` (`redirect_uri` not registered. message: `"redirect_uri does not match any registered URI."`).

401.description: App not found or inactive. Error code: `invalid_client`. Message: `"Invalid client credentials."`

500.description: Authorization service unavailable. Error code: `internal_error`. Message: `"An unexpected error occurred."` Retry the request.

post.description: Exchange an authorization code for tokens, or refresh an access token using a refresh token. Accepts application/x-www-form-urlencoded (recommended) or application/json.

400.description: Invalid or missing parameter. Possible error codes: `bad_request` (malformed body or unsupported Content-Type), `unsupported_grant_type` (`grant_type` is not `authorization_code` or `refresh_token`), `invalid_request` (missing required parameter for the given `grant_type`), `invalid_grant` (authorization code is invalid, expired, already used, or does not match).

error.message: The provided authorization grant is invalid, expired, or does not match.

500.description: Token exchange failed. The authorization server was unavailable or returned an unexpected response. Retry the request.

post.description: Revoke an access token or refresh token. Returns 200 even if already revoked.

200.description: Token revoked. Also returned if the token was already revoked or expired.

400.description: Invalid or missing parameter. Possible error codes: `bad_request` (malformed JSON body), `invalid_request` (missing `token`, `client_id`, or `client_secret`; or `token` is not a valid access token. refresh tokens are not accepted).

500.description: An unexpected error occurred during credential validation.

get.description: Verifies if the provided access_token is valid and returns the authentication data of the logged-in app and user. Useful for integrators to check token validity.
Returns a paginated list of people in the workspace. Does not include embedded `company`, `tags`, or `lists`. `custom_fields` are included.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Maximum: 50.

post.description: Creates a new person in the workspace. Returns the created person with embedded `company`, `tags`, `lists`, and `custom_fields`.

get.description: Returns a person by ID with embedded `company`, `tags`, `lists`, and `custom_fields`.

patch.description: Updates a person. Only fields included in the body are modified. Returns the updated person with embedded `company`, `tags`, `lists`, and `custom_fields`.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a person. The record is no longer accessible via the API.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of companies in the workspace. Does not include embedded `tags` or `lists`. `custom_fields` are included.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of records per page. Maximum: 50.

post.description: Creates a new company in the workspace. Returns the created company with embedded `tags`, `lists`, and `custom_fields`.

get.description: Returns a company by ID with embedded `tags`, `lists`, and `custom_fields`.

patch.description: Updates a company. Only fields included in the body are modified. Returns the updated company with embedded `tags`, `lists`, and `custom_fields`.

delete.description: Soft-deletes a company. The record is no longer accessible via the API.

post.description: Creates a new deal in the workspace. The `source` field is automatically set to the name of the OAuth app making the request and cannot be set by the caller.

400.description: Invalid or unparseable JSON body. Error code: `bad_request`. Message: `"Request body must be valid JSON."`

error.message: Request body must be valid JSON.

get.description: Returns a deal by ID with embedded pipeline, stage, products, custom fields, tags, people, and companies.

patch.description: Updates a deal. Only fields included in the body are modified. `source` cannot be changed.

400.description: Invalid or unparseable JSON body. Error code: `bad_request`. Message: `"Request body must be valid JSON."` For PATCH with no fields: code `bad_request`, message `"No fields provided for update."`

delete.description: Soft-delete: the record is no longer accessible via the API.

Unauthorized.description: Token missing, invalid, or expired. Possible error codes and messages: `unauthorized`. `"Missing or invalid Authorization header."`, `"Invalid or malformed token."`, or `"Token is missing required claims."`; `token_expired`. `"Access token expired. Refresh using the refresh token."`

InsufficientScope.description: Token lacks the required scope. Error code: `insufficient_scope`. Message: `"This endpoint requires the '{scope}' scope."` where `{scope}` is the exact missing scope (e.g. `"This endpoint requires the 'deals:write' scope."`).

NotFound.description: Resource not found, soft-deleted, or belongs to another workspace. Error code: `not_found`. Message: `"Deal not found."`

ValidationError.description: Input validation failed. Error code: `validation_error`. Message: `"Validation failed."` The `fields` object maps each invalid field to a description of the problem.

RateLimitExceeded.description: Rate limit exceeded. Error code: `rate_limit_exceeded`. Message: `"Rate limit exceeded. Try again in {N} seconds."` The `Retry-After` response header contains the same value.

error.message: Rate limit exceeded. Try again in 60 seconds.

BadRequest.description: Malformed request body or empty update. Error code: `bad_request`. Possible messages: `"Request body must be valid JSON."` (unparseable body) or `"No fields provided for update."` (PATCH with no fields).

error.message: Request body must be valid JSON.

InternalError.description: Unexpected server error. Error code: `internal_error`. Possible messages: `"An unexpected error occurred."` (generic failure) or `"Deal updated but associations failed. Retry the associations."` (main record saved but association update failed). Use the `request_id` to correlate with server-side logs.

total.description: Total number of records matching the query.

has_more.description: `true` when there are more pages after the current one.

description.example: Integration with Vendaze to sync contacts.

avatar_image.description: Public HTTPS URL or full base64 data URI of your app logo (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF. Max 2MB.

scopes.description: Scopes your app needs. Users approve them individually on the consent screen.

avatar_url.description: Public URL of the stored avatar. Only present if avatar_image was provided in the request.

client_id.description: Current client_id of the app being rotated.

email.description: Email address registered with the app. Used to verify ownership. The API never reveals which email is on file.

app_name.description: New name shown to users on the consent screen. Max 100 chars. If omitted, the current name is kept.

description.description: New description of what your app does. Max 500 chars. If omitted, the current description is kept.

avatar_image.description: Public HTTPS URL or full base64 data URI of your app logo (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF. If omitted, the current avatar is kept.

redirect_uris.description: New list of HTTPS redirect URIs. Replaces the previous list entirely. If omitted, the current list is kept.

client_id.description: The app's client_id. Does not change after rotation.

avatar_url.description: Public URL of the stored avatar. Only present if avatar_image was provided in the request.

workspace_slug.description: Slug of the workspace the user authorized. Use this to identify the connected account in your app.

token.description: The access_token (JWT) to revoke. Must be the access_token, not the refresh_token.

Owner.description: Workspace member responsible for this record. `null` when no owner is assigned.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner. The API resolves it to the internal user ID. Must be a member of this workspace.

avatar_image.description: Public HTTPS URL or full base64 data URI of the image (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF.

tags.description: Tag names (keys) to associate with the person. If a tag doesn't exist, it will be automatically created.

list_ids.description: List IDs to associate with the person.

field_key.description: Key of the custom field (e.g. `lead_source`). If no field with this key exists in the workspace, it is created automatically with type `text`.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values to set for the person. Identified by `field_key`. If the field does not exist, it is created automatically with type `text`.

UpdatePersonRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only fields included in the body are modified.

company_id.description: Pass `null` to remove the company association.

position.description: Pass `null` to clear the job title.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner. Pass `null` to remove the owner. Must be a member of this workspace.

avatar_image.description: Public HTTPS URL or full base64 data URI of the image (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). Replaces the current avatar. Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF.

tags.description: Tag names (keys) to associate. Behavior depends on `association_mode`. If a tag doesn't exist, it will be automatically created.

list_ids.description: List IDs to associate. Behavior depends on `association_mode`.

field_key.description: Key of the custom field (e.g. `lead_source`). If no field with this key exists in the workspace, it is created automatically with type `text`.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values. Behavior depends on `association_mode`. In `append` mode, replaces the value for each `field_key` sent without touching others.

association_mode.description: Controls how associations (`tags`, `list_ids`, `custom_fields`) are applied. `append`: adds new associations without removing existing ones. `replace`: removes all current associations of each sent type and inserts the new ones. Sending an empty array with `replace` removes all associations of that type.

PersonList.description: Compact person object returned in list responses. Does not include embedded `company`, `tags`, or `lists`.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner. The API resolves it to the internal user ID. Must be a member of this workspace.

avatar_image.description: Public HTTPS URL or full base64 data URI of the image (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF.

tags.description: Tag names (keys) to associate with the company. If a tag doesn't exist, it will be automatically created.

list_ids.description: List IDs to associate with the company.

field_key.description: Key of the custom field (e.g. `industry`). If no field with this key exists in the workspace, it is created automatically with type `text`.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values to set for the company. Identified by `field_key`. If the field does not exist, it is created automatically with type `text`.

UpdateCompanyRequest.description: All fields are optional. Only fields included in the body are modified.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner. Pass `null` to remove the owner. Must be a member of this workspace.

avatar_image.description: Public HTTPS URL or full base64 data URI of the image (e.g. `data:image/png;base64,...`). Replaces the current avatar. Accepted formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF, BMP, TIFF.

tags.description: Tag names (keys) to associate. Behavior depends on `association_mode`. If a tag doesn't exist, it will be automatically created.

list_ids.description: List IDs to associate. Behavior depends on `association_mode`.

field_key.description: Key of the custom field (e.g. `industry`). If no field with this key exists in the workspace, it is created automatically with type `text`.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values. Behavior depends on `association_mode`. In `append` mode, replaces the value for each `field_key` sent without touching others.

association_mode.description: Controls how associations (`tags`, `list_ids`, `custom_fields`) are applied. `append`: adds new associations without removing existing ones. `replace`: removes all current associations of each sent type and inserts the new ones. Sending an empty array with `replace` removes all associations of that type.

CompanyList.description: Compact company object returned in list responses. Does not include embedded `tags` or `lists`.

CurrencyCode.description: ISO 4217 currency code supported by Vendaze.

total_price_cts.description: Total price in cents (unit_price_cts x quantity).

source.description: Name of the OAuth app that created the deal. Read-only.

quantity.description: Number of units. Only applicable for one-time products. Recurring products (monthly, quarterly, annually) always use quantity 1 regardless of the value sent.

unit_price_cts.description: Overrides the product's catalog price. In cents. If omitted, the product's default price is used.

price_cts.description: Deal value in cents. If the request includes associated products (`products`), this value and the currency (`currency`) will be ignored. The deal will automatically inherit the calculated sum of the products and the currency of the first associated product.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner. The API resolves it to the internal user ID. Must be a member of this workspace.

person_ids.description: People to associate with this deal.

company_ids.description: Companies to associate with this deal.

tags.description: Tag names (keys) to associate with the deal. If a tag doesn't exist, it will be automatically created.

field_key.description: Key of the custom field (e.g. `deal_source`). If no field with this key exists in the workspace, it is created automatically with type `text`.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values to set for the deal. Identified by `field_key`. If the field does not exist, it is created automatically with type `text`.

price_cts.description: Deal value in cents. If the request includes associated products (`products`), this value and the currency (`currency`) will be ignored. The deal will automatically inherit the calculated sum of the products and the currency of the first associated product.

owner_email.description: Email of the workspace member to set as owner. Pass `null` to remove the owner. Must be a member of this workspace.

tags.description: Tag names (keys) to associate with the deal. If a tag doesn't exist, it will be automatically created.

field_key.description: Key of the custom field (e.g. `deal_source`). If no field with this key exists in the workspace, it is created automatically with type `text`.

custom_fields.description: Custom field values. Behavior depends on `association_mode`. In `append` mode, replaces the value for each `field_key` sent without touching others.

association_mode.description: append: adds without removing existing. replace: removes all associations of the sent types and inserts the new ones.
